  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl used by de.uka.ilkd.key.control 
    Class and Description
    ApplyStrategyInfo
    The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl used by de.uka.ilkd.key.macros 
    Class and Description
    DefaultTaskFinishedInfo 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl used by de.uka.ilkd.key.prover 
    Class and Description
    ApplyStrategyInfo
    The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies.
    SingleRuleApplicationInfo
    Instances of this class are used to store if a rule could be applied automatically and if not to store the reason why no rule applications could be performed.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl used by de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl 
    Class and Description
    AbstractProverCore
    Common class for provers which takes care of listener registration and task event propagation
    ApplyStrategyInfo
    The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies.
    DefaultGoalChooser
    Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied.
    SingleRuleApplicationInfo
    Instances of this class are used to store if a rule could be applied automatically and if not to store the reason why no rule applications could be performed.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl used by de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl 
    Class and Description
    ApplyStrategyInfo
    The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies.

    Class and Description
    DefaultGoalChooser
    Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied.
    DepthFirstGoalChooser
    Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied.
    SingleRuleApplicationInfo
    Instances of this class are used to store if a rule could be applied automatically and if not to store the reason why no rule applications could be performed.
